title: Sound Muffler
description: Sound Muffler is a Minecraft mod that muffles sounds when they are in a 9 block radius of a sound muffler block.
body:
Sound Muffler is a Minecraft mod that muffles sounds when they are in a 9 block radius of a sound muffler block.

**WIP - Mod is still in Alpha stages.**

More features, settings and more mufflers are planned for the future.
